client_card.body: Your interest in AI infrastructure stocks is intriguing, given your existing tech holdings. It's worth a conversation to explore how this might fit into your overall wealth strategy.

portfolio_match.context: Your portfolio already holds 40.00% in US Tech Equities (CHF 2,560,000) — this is an overweight position with significant concentration risk. Adding more exposure to this sector would increase risk further.

profile.follow_up_hook: Felix, what specific AI infrastructure stocks are you considering for your next investment?
